noblePhantasm.detail: Deal significant [Skill Seal] Special Attack damage to a single enemy  + Gain C. Stars

profile:
A Servant who underwent a surprise class change to a swimsuit...or rather, a stage magician's Spirit Origin. Her class may be Caster, but she can't do a single Caster-like thing. She can, however, pull doves out of thin air. The doves are just non-biological ether bodies, but they sure look like doves. 
Other than during battle, her clumsiness hasn't changed.
She practices every day in hopes of one day pulling off a graceful magic show in front of Master and an audience.

name: Leonardo da Vinci (Ruler)

noblePhantasm.name: Dinosaur Summer Goodbye
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase NP Strength (1 turn)  for yourself + Deal significant damage to a single enemy + Different effects will be activated depending on the random bullet color

profile:
Adventure's in the air this summer!
And with that prediction, Da Vinci in her young girl form obtained a swimsuit Spirit Origin.
She has researched and pored over countless past event records, and now she is ready to enjoy this excursion to the fullest.

name: Kama (Avenger)

classSkills.name: Core of the Demon King(?) B

noblePhantasm.name: Kama Rūpāstra
noblePhantasm.detail: Deal heavy [Charm] Special Attack damage  & decrease DEF (3 turns) for all enemies

profile:
"Kama? She's rather charming these days, don't you think?"
In an act of retaliation against Pārvatī and others' disagreeably warm comments, the god of love has awakened as the Demon King Mara (or so she claims).

Summer is full of temptation. 'Tis the season of depravity.
What kind of Demon King would she be if she doesn't assert her presence? Newly motivated, she changes into a cute swimsuit and tries even more aggressively than usual to corrupt her Master...

"What do you think? This is the true form of the summer Demon King Mara. Scared that you might accidentally get corrupted?"

Everyone nodded, agreeing that it is indeed terrifying that she's no different than the usual Kama.

name: Caenis (Rider)

classSkills.name: Core of the Sea God B

noblePhantasm.name: Sea Serpent, Storm Blue
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase NP Strength (3 turns) & Critical Strength (3 turns)  & increase ATK (1 turn) only on [Near Water] field for yourself + Deal significant damage to a single enemy

profile:
By changing into a swimsuit, Caenis converted their Spirit Origin to the Rider class, and was then hired as an interim safety officer by Goredolf. While fulfilling their summer duties at Chaldea, they still intend to enjoy themself in their own way during their free time.

Given the choice, Lancer Caenis wouldn't even approach the beach on their own, but in this Spirit Origin you might spot them heading out with a quick "be right back," surfboard in hand.

name: Sei Shounagon (Berserker)

classSkills.name: Teachings that Drive to Enlightenment B

noblePhantasm.name: Emotional Engine, Vivid Full Sensation
noblePhantasm.detail: Apply Special Attack against enemies with [Human Attribute] (1 turn)  & Special Attack against [Lawful] Servant enemies (1 turn) & Special Attack against [Shadow Servants] (1 turn) to yourself + Deal significant damage to a single enemy

profile:
"In summer, the nights are most beautiful. Not only when the moon shines..." or so the writing goes, but there are a ton more super fun things to enjoy during the summer! The beach, swimsuits, shaved ice... I might even want to do a little adventuring! ...This is how another girl from the Heian period became entranced by the allure of summer.

"Hey Chan-mas...wanna do something we're not supposed to?"
And thus Berserker Sei Shounagon was born.

Whether one spends their summer earnestly or living a little dangerously, the fact of the matter is that this year's summer happens only once in your life, so you might as well enjoy it to the fullest!!!

name: Jacques de Molay

classSkills.name: Entity of the Outer Realm A

noblePhantasm.name: Vendredi Treize
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase NP Strength (3 turns)  for yourself + Deal heavy damage & inflict Curse (5 turns) & inflict Disastrous Curse (increase Curse damage) (5 turns) to all enemies

profile:
The Knights Templar was a military order tasked with protecting the people undertaking pilgrimages to Jerusalem. Molay was the twenty-third and final grand master of the order. The Templars leveraged their privilege and spread their influence across Europe, and they utilized their financial resources, on par with an entire nation's treasury, to function as one of the first international banks in history. However, the order's tendency toward secrecy also led to a great many unflattering rumors founded in envy, such as that the group practiced black magic. Ultimately, the entire order was disbanded under suspicion of heresy.

Molay was burned at the stake at Île de la Cité in Paris. She screamed curses before her death, and within a year of Molay's execution, the King of France and the Pope, the primary architects of the Templars' dissolution, died unexpectedly.

name: Zenobia

noblePhantasm.name: Authentic Triumph
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase ATK (1 turn) & Critical Strength (3 turns)  for yourself + Deal heavy Special Attack damage to all [King] enemies

profile:
A third-century queen who ruled the Palmyrene Empire (kingdom) that was located near present day Syria. Palmyrene was under the Roman Empire's control, but it expanded its territory by invading countries like Egypt. Zenobia, who actually held power, bestowed the title of emperor upon her son and began their rebellion against the Roman Empire.

However, when the militant emperor Aurelian ascended the Roman throne and began a series of conquests to restore Rome's glory, the Palmyrene Empire collapsed, and Zenobia was captured. During Aurelian's triumph, Zenobia was humiliated by being forced to parade through the city of Rome wearing dazzling golden shackles, chains, and jewels. Following this, Zenobia's fate is uncertain. Some say she died, while some say she lived happily as an ordinary Roman citizen...

name: Elisabeth Báthory (Cinderella)

noblePhantasm.name: Fairy Tale Erzsébet
noblePhantasm.detail: Remove Debuffs for yourself + Increase ATK for all [Fairy Tale Servants] (3 turns)  + Deal significant damage to one enemy

profile:
A new Halloween means the rise of a new heroine. The legendary Halloween Servant has made her comeback thanks to the vocal support of her fervent fanbase!

"This Elisabeth～♪ Is no ordinary idol～♪ I can sing～ I can dance～ I'm a super musical idol～♪"

name: Izumo-no-Okuni

noblePhantasm.name: The Okuni Special, Izumo Aragami Kabuki
noblePhantasm.detail: Decrease Quick Card resistance (3 turns) & deal significant Special Attack damage to a single [Demonic] enemy

profile:
A performer during Japan's Azuchi-Momoyama period (1573 - 1603 AD), she is said to be the progenitor of "kabuki-odori" dances, which evolved over the years to become kabuki as we know it today.

She was called the shrine maiden of Izumo, and traveled and performed all across the nation. Her dances were said to promote Izumo Taisha, one of Japan's prominent Shinto shrines, but the truth is shrouded in mystery...

Okuni's kabuki-odori was extremely popular, enthralling audiences everywhere. However, it later came to be regarded by the people in power as immoral and was therefore shunned. It is said that, following this, she set off on a long journey to nowhere in particular.

name: Mysterious Ranmaru X

classSkills.name: Entity of the Outer Realm D

noblePhantasm.name: Orchid Rounds X
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase C. Star Drop Rate (1 turn)  for yourself + Deal heavy DEF-ignoring damage to all enemies

profile:
Mori Naritoshi, a military commander during Japan's Warring States period, was the third son of Mori Yoshinari, one of Oda Nobunaga's retainers. As an attendant to Oda Nobunaga, Naritoshi was known by the nickname of Ranmaru. He was killed along with his lord Nobunaga in the Honnoji Incident.

...Or at least, so goes the history of Mori Ranmaru from Earth.

This Mysterious Ranmaru X hails from the Planet Ranmaru, located on the far side of the galaxy, where many Mori Ranmarus live. "Ranmaru X" is the title granted only to the greatest of the Mori Ranmarus. 

Okay, what the hell is going on here?

name: Sakamoto Ryouma (Lancer)

noblePhantasm.name: Dear Dragon, Race across the Waves of Wadatsumi
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase NP Strength (3 turns)  & greatly increase DEF (1 turn) for yourself + Deal heavy damage to all enemies

profile:
A patriot who left his mark upon Japan's Bakumatsu period.

He was born in a samurai household in the Tosa Domain, but he abandoned his birthplace to apprentice under Katsu Kaishu and established the Kameyama Troupe (which later became the Kaientai). He contributed greatly to the Meiji Restoration by mediating the SatChou Alliance and advocated for restoring imperial rule. However, he did not live to see the Meiji era, as he was assassinated before he could complete his great work.
 
An enigmatic young man in his late twenties, he is trained in the Hokushin Ittouryu style swordsmanship, but retains a gentle heart, preferring to avoid fights. In his place, the mysterious beauty who never leaves his side flies effortlessly about the battlefield.

While he is most suited to the Rider class, certain factors lead to his manifestation here as a Lancer.

name: Martha (Santa)

noblePhantasm.name: Happy Merry Christmas
noblePhantasm.detail: Restore HP  & increase ATK (3 turns) & apply Special Attack [Divine, Demon, and Undead] (3 turns) for all allies + Gain C. Stars

profile:
Thanks to Scáthach-Skadi's meddling, Martha has become a Santa Servant. In 2023, once again a new Santa Claus takes flight.

Her memories (records) are somewhat obscure. While she acknowledges Protagonist as her Master and is aware of her role as a Heroic Spirit in Chaldea, she is less aware that she is Saint Martha. She's in a similar position to young Alexander, though in Martha's case, she's just not quite convinced she is THE Saint Martha.

"I'm a holy maiden? Are you sure? Hmm, I don't think you would lie, but I still don't believe it."

To Martha, it all feels like someone else's business...

name: Taigong Wang

noblePhantasm.name: Dǎ Shén Biān
noblePhantasm.detail: Deal heavy [Divine] Special Attack damage & decrease Quick Card Resistance (3 turns)  for all enemies

profile:
A legendary tactician from ancient China. Born Jiang Shang, he is also known as Shi Shangfu, Jiang Taigong, and Jiang Ziya. One day, he was fishing on the north bank of the Wei River when King Wen of the Zhou dynasty happened by. King Wen realized he had found the sage his father Taigong had been waiting for, and granted him the title "Taigong Wang," meaning "my father's wish."

Taigong Wang was instrumental in King Wen and King Wu's efforts to overthrow the Yin dynasty. He was rewarded for his service with land on the Shangdon peninsula, which he turned into the state of Qi, where he served as ruler during the Spring and Fall Warring States period.

In the Ming period novel "Fengshen Yanyi," or the "Investiture of the Gods," Taigong Wang is depicted as a Taoist practitioner with supernatural powers.

According to Taigong Wang himself, "It's too bad, really. If I'd only been summoned as a Caster, I'd have definitely been Grand Caster."

name: Dobrynya Nikitich

noblePhantasm.name: Zmei Gorynych
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase Buster Card effectiveness (1 turn)  for yourself + Deal heavy DEF-ignoring damage & inflict Burn (3 turns) & decrease DEF (3 turns) for all enemies

profile:
A famed dragon-slayer, and one of the valiant "Bogatyr" warriors portrayed in the epic songs known as bylina.

Dobrynya Nikitich was one of the greatest Bogatyrs ever to serve the legendary Sun Prince, Grand Prince Vladimir of Kiev. The only one to ever surpass him was Ilya Muromets, the strongest of all the Bogatyrs. He is best known for slaying the evil three-headed dragon Zmei Gorynych to rescue the princess of Kiev, and by legends about his wife Nastasia.

According to the stories in which the character appears, Nikitich is a man, which this Nikitich confirms. However, in this manifestation, she appears decidedly female. Whenever she is asked about this discrepancy, she just shrugs and says, "Yes, that's true."

name: Koyanskaya of Dark

classSkills.name: Entity of the Outer Realm C

noblePhantasm.name: Tunguska Nine Drive
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase ATK (1 turn) for yourself + Deal heavy Special Attack damage to all enemies with [Earth powers]  & remove ATK Buffs & decrease Buster Card Resistance (3 turns) for all enemies

profile:
Koyanskaya of Dark... The other half of Koyanskaya, which split from her during the sealing of Lostbelt: Beast IV. She has become even more wicked than when she was pretending to be a Disciple of the Foreign God. This half is the Koyanskaya who mocks and abuses Humanity.

She is Tamamo-no-Mae absent any intent to become a good wife (er, let's just put aside the question of whether you can call yourself Tamamo-no-Mae when you have no intention of being a good wife...). She is a destroyer, and her aspect as an evil spirit (a naturally occurring spirit) is at the fore.

name: Hephaistíon

noblePhantasm.name: Hecatic Wheel
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase NP Strength (1 turn)  for yourself + Deal significant damage & decrease Arts Card Resistance (3 turns) & decrease Buster Card Resistance (3 turns) for a single enemy

profile:
History remembers Hephaistíon as Iskandar, the King of Conquerors', most beloved confidant and retainer. This...is not that Hephaistíon.

She is a mysterious mage from the Age of Gods who pledged unending loyalty to Iskandar, but at the same time hated the king and his army more than anyone else.

name: Manannan mac Lir (Bazett)

noblePhantasm.name: Fragarach
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase ATK (1 turn)  & apply Target Focus (1 turn) & "Fragarach Counter" status (1 turn)  for yourself

profile:
The Celtic god of the sea, and a mage. Also said to be the ruler of the Otherworld.

The adoptive father of the sun god Lugh, he is also a god of giving, known for bestowing enchanted items upon many warriors, including Cú Chulainn and Diarmuid Ua Duibhne.

One of his most famous gifts is Fragarach, which has been passed down through the Fraga family to the present day.

Now, this sea god has materialized in our time as a Pseudo-Servant inhabiting the body of Bazett Fraga McRemitz, the latest descendant of the Fraga family. Bazett is a Seal Designation Enforcer for the Mage's Association, and she also seems to have (some) memories of a certain Holy Grail War...

name: Hai Bà Trưng

noblePhantasm.name: Let Us Walk Our Land Together
noblePhantasm.detail: Deal significant damage to a single enemy + Increase Arts Card effectiveness (3 turns)  & Buster Card effectiveness (3 turns)  & apply "Restore HP each turn (3 turns)" for all allies

profile:
Hai Bà Trưng, or the Trưng sisters, were the leaders of the rebel army that fought against the Later Han Dynasty's rule during the first century AD. When Trưng Trắc's husband, an influential leader himself, was killed by Su Ding, the Giao Chỉ governor-general, Trắc and her younger sister, Nhị, became central figures in the fight against the Dynasty's rule.

Trưng Trắc quickly took over sixty-five citadels and claimed the throne. However, the Emperor of the Later Han sent Ma Yuan (an ancestor of Ma Chao of "Romance of the Three Kingdoms") to suppress the rebellion. Though Hai Bà Trưng fought valiantly, they were ultimately defeated after the feudal lords abandoned them after beginning to see them as the losing side.

In the final moments of their lives, some say the sisters were beheaded. Some say they threw themselves into the river, holding hands. And some even say they ascended into the clouds.

name: Taisui Xingjun

noblePhantasm.name: Taisui Awakens
noblePhantasm.detail: Inflict [Taisui's Calamity]  (3 turns) & inflict Curse (5 turns) & deal heavy [Human Attribute] Special Attack damage  to all enemies

profile:
Taisui Xingjun, also called Taisaishin, is the deified form of Taisui, the theoretical celestial body which reflects Jupiter. Taisui is thought to be the being described in legend as a lump of flesh that travels underground, sometimes called "shìròu." Since this being is said to bring misfortune, Taisui also possesses the aspect of a Tatari-gami (a wrathful god who spreads curses).

Taisaishin is a directional god. His location each year is found in the direction of that year's animal zodiac. His presence is believed to influence whether actions performed in that direction will be lucky or unlucky.

name: Super Bunyan

noblePhantasm.name: America's Dark Sweetheart
noblePhantasm.detail: Deal significant damage  & decrease DEF (3 turns)  to a single enemy

profile:
Paul Bunyan the giant, a hero born from a tall tale.
Her new form is...

Gender: Female (As expected) (Because of reasons)
Age: Teenager
Size: Average (Wait, why!?)
Personality: It's Complicated
Role: Everyone's Leader (President?)

Wait, wait. Hold on. What does this mean?
Still, it seems fairly...really...incredibly great!
...It IS great, right?

name: Daikokuten

noblePhantasm.name: Nezumi Jyodo
noblePhantasm.detail: Decrease Quick Card resistance (1 turn) for all enemies & Deal heavy Special Attack damage against all enemies with [Earth powers]  + Increase Critical Strength (3 turns) for all allies

profile:
One of the Shichifukujin, seven Japanese gods of fortune. However, the Heroic Spirit(s) who manifested as a Servant are not the god itself, but mouse envoys sent in his place. As a result, their spiritual power is fairly low compared to the god's original form, and their abilities are accordingly restricted. Specifically, they are limited to things like: "If you would like some rice balls, we will gladly make you lots," and, "If you would like us to multiply, that can be arranged!"

Ahh, what a fortunate sight.

name: Mary Anning

noblePhantasm.name: Duria Antiquior
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase Arts Card effectiveness (1 turn)  for yourself + Deal heavy damage & inflict Nullify Buff (1 time, 3 turns) to all enemies

profile:
One of the greatest fossil hunters to ever live, known to paleontologists far and wide.

As a child, she would excavate fossils with her family to help make ends meet. At the tender age of twelve, she became a paleontology sensation when she discovered the first remains of an ichthyosaurus. She went on to dig up numerous other invaluable fossils, which she both used to forge connections and sold to scholars and aristocrats to put food on the table.

Unfortunately, her fame turned out to be fleeting, and she was eventually swallowed up by the oblivious sands of time...

...but it never disappeared completely. Though never again as well-known as she was in her heyday, her legacy endured even to the present, just like the mysterious stones she spent her life chasing.

name: Kōnstantînos XI

noblePhantasm.name: Theodosius Kōnstantînos
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase Buster Card effectiveness (3 turns) & apply Invincible (1 time, 1 turn) for yourself + Greatly increase DEF (1 turn)  for all allies + Apply Damage Cut to all [Roman] trait allies (1 turn)

profile: The last emperor of the Byzantine Empire, also known as the Eastern Roman Empire. Rome, in all its greatness, is said to have finally died with him, after the fall of Constantinople. Even as the empire was on the verge of ruin, he fought to protect it.

name: Charlemagne

noblePhantasm.name: Joyeuse Ordre
noblePhantasm.detail: Deal heavy damage  & decrease Quick Attack Resistance (3 turns)  for all enemies

profile: Charlemagne, king and leader of the Twelve Paladins, manifests as a gift from beyond. He is the founding king of Western Europe and is more commonly known as Karl der Große, or Charles the Great. A naive, carefree young man, he cares more about being cool than about the dignity expected of a king.

name: Roland

personalSkills.name: Bitter Tears Shed for Love of Love C

noblePhantasm.name: Durendal
noblePhantasm.detail: Apply Ignore Invincible (1 turn) & increase ATK (3 turns)  & Critical Strength (3 turns)  for yourself + Deal significant damage to a single enemy

profile:
Strong, unyielding, noble, and possessing a dazzling smile. This holy knight cares not for riches, but cherishes his love for his God. So long as he is treated with courtesy, he will reciprocate, even to an enemy. Uncouthness and rude behavior make him tremble with rage. Possessed of a hot temper, he will rise to meet any injustice he encounters, no matter the odds.

...Usually, anyway. Every so often, though, he goes into a love-besotted mania and strips naked. That single shortcoming aside, he really is an incredible knight. It's just the disrobing thing...really...

name: Kriemhild

noblePhantasm.name: Balmung Kriemhild
noblePhantasm.detail: Remove DEF Buffs & deal significant Special Attack [Dragon] damage & decrease Arts Card resistance (3 turns)  to a single enemy

profile: In the "Nibelungenlied," or the legend of Siegfried, Kriemhild was Siegfried's wife. When Siegfried was assassinated, she swore vengeance, and took it thanks to an ingenious plan and her own innate persistence. Capable of cold cruelty, she is a terrifying force of vengeance. However, she is also a noble, beautiful queen.

name: James Moriarty

noblePhantasm.name: Mathemalignancy: Annihilation
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase NP Strength (1 turn)  for yourself + Deal heavy Special Attack damage to all [Good] enemies & inflict Skill Seal (1 turn) & apply [Evil] trait to all enemies (3 turns)

profile:
A kind, articulate young man, he's a little self-conscious about the frightening glare he always seems to have, but he's really quite amicable. He loves mathematics, and is constantly calculating or tabulating something. Perhaps he will make waves in mathematics, or become a great teacher... Whatever path he chooses to take, his future is bright!

He stands at a crossroads. Does he abandon his pursuit of glory, or sink into evil?
Ah, but that decision was made long ago.
I shall be the very avatar of evil.

name: Don Quixote

noblePhantasm.name: Valiente Asalto Dedicado a la Princesa
noblePhantasm.detail: Deal significant Special Attack damage to a single [Giant] enemy + Reduce your HP by 1000 [Demerit] + Increase ATK (3 turns) & Critical Strength (3 turns)  for all allies

profile:
A noble knight-errant and great hero who travels the world to spread the word of the lovely Princess Dulcinea, alongside his trusty companion Sancho! He is a great elder knight who left his mark on the world in countless battles against giants and hostile knights.

...Is that to your liking, sir?

name: Zhang Jue

noblePhantasm.name: Cāngtiān Yǐ Sǐ, Huáng Tiān Dāng Lì
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase your NP Strength (1 turn)  + When on a [Forest] field, decrease Quick Card resistance for all enemies (3 turns) + When on a [Near Water] field, decrease Arts Card resistance for all enemies (3 turns) + When on a [Sunlight] field, decrease Buster Card resistance for all enemies (3 turns) + When on a [Burning] field, decrease Critical Rate for all enemies (3 turns) + Deal heavy damage to all enemies

profile:
Zhang Jue was the founder of the religious Taoist movement called the Way of the Taiping, and he led his followers in the Yellow Turban Rebellion. In the "Romance of the Three Kingdoms," it is said a sage gave him tomes titled "Taipingjing," or "Scriptures of the Great Peace." These writings purportedly helped Zhang Jue learn various kinds of sorcery, such as control over weather. Later, Zhang Jue was said to employ various items, such as enchanted water called fúshuǐ, to save many people, and he soon came to call himself "Great Teacher." His reputation helped him build a large following, and the group came to be known as the Yellow Turbans, owing to their headwear.

In the year 184, the Yellow Turbans finally rose up in rebellion against the corrupt Han Dynasty, which mistreated the people and were thought to be the cause of the many disasters plaguing the nation. Zhang Jue gave himself the title "General of Heaven," his younger brother Zhang Bao "General of Earth," and Zhang Liang "General of the People."

But during the conflict, Zhang Jue died of illness. After his death, Zhang Bao and Zhang Liang fell in battle, and the Yellow Turban Rebellion approached its end.

name: Kyokutei Bakin

noblePhantasm.name: Nansou Satomi Eight Dog Chronicles
noblePhantasm.detail: Apply Special Attack [Demonic] to yourself (1 turn) + Deal heavy [Evil] Special Attack damage  to all enemies + Gain C. Stars

profile:
A writer from late Edo Japan, and one of Japan's best-known authors. His works include "Nansou Satomi Hakkenden (Nansou Satomi Eight Dog Chronicles)," "Chinsetsu Yumiharizuki (A Wonder Tale: The Moonbow)," "Keisei Suikoden" (an adaptation of the Chinese classic "The Water Margin"), "Kinsesetsu Bishonenroku (A Modern-Day Record of Handsome Youths)," and many more.

The well-known ukiyo-e artist and contemporary of Bakin, Katsushika Hokusai, contributed illustrations to many of Bakin's most popular works, including "Chinsetsu Yumiharizuki."

Born to a samurai family—a source of constant pride for Bakin—his innate talent for the written word ultimately led to him becoming the first Japanese person to make a living solely from writing.

name: Minamoto-no-Tametomo

noblePhantasm.name: Gouchin Yumiharizuki
noblePhantasm.detail: Apply Ignore Invincible (1 turn) & Ignore DEF (1 turn) & increase Buster Card effectiveness only when on a [Near Water] field (1 turn) for yourself + Deal heavy [Lawful] Special Attack damage  to all enemies

profile:
Unparalleled skill, transcendent strength, and an inhuman physique. A fighting machine who appeared seemingly out of nowhere during the Warring States period. He called himself Chinzei Hachirou, and was both feared and admired by people far and wide.

A hero out of time, who was never merely human.

What were his arrows truly meant for?

name: Archetype: EARTH

noblePhantasm.name: Marble Phantasm
noblePhantasm.detail: Change field to [Millennium Castle] state (3 turns) + Deal heavy Special Attack [Chaotic] damage  to all enemies + Increase NP Gauge for all [modern human (certain Pseudo-Servants, Demi-Servants, etc.)] allies excluding yourself

profile: Her name is Archetype: EARTH. In the world of magecraft, she is a form of life known as an Ultimate One. At times, she has been a terrifying overlord of all vampires, at times a vampire herself bounding about like a rabbit on the moon, and at times a sheltered princess who slipped in unannounced! Naturally oblivious and innocent to a fault, this sun-kissed vamp queen is here for the festivities!

name: Xu Fu

noblePhantasm.name: I Present the Elixir of Eternal Life <Lie>
noblePhantasm.detail: Greatly restore HP & restore HP each turn (3 turns)  & gain C. Stars each turn (5 turns) for yourself

profile: A Taoist (sorcerer) who served China's Qin dynasty. After Qin Shi Huang ordered her to find an elixir of immortality, she assembled three thousand young men and women and set off for Japan. Though she reached her destination, she never did manage to return to China. Legends of Xu Fu endure in various corners of Japan to this day, where she is said to have introduced pharmaceuticals, ceramic techniques, and more.

name: Lady Avalon

personalSkills.name: Light Be in Your Hands B
Flower Blooming on a Summer's Night D

noblePhantasm.name: Winds of Avalon
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase Max HP (3 turns) & increase NP Gauge each turn (3 turns) for all allies + Gain C. Stars each turn for yourself (5 turns)

profile:
When did she get here...? A pretty, flowery mage who's there, smiling a gentle smile before you even notice her.

Who could she be...?

name: Gareth (Saber)

noblePhantasm.name: Lupus Strike Fang
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase ATK (1 turn)  & increase ATK (1 turn) only when on a [Sunlight] field  for yourself + Deal heavy damage to all enemies

profile:
After changing into a swimsuit, Gareth has obtained a new Saber Spirit Origin. And of course, now that she is a Saber, said by many to be the strongest class, she has something that every Saber needs. That's right: a sword. A red, demonic, immaculately designed sword she could never have wielded as a Lancer!
 
Now watch and be amazed as Midsummer Saber Gareth draws her mystic sword with an impeccable flourish!

name: Ibuki-Douji (Berserker)

classSkills.name: Core of the Serpent God A

noblePhantasm.name: Ibuki-no-Mitama, Eight Surging Waves
noblePhantasm.detail: Remove DEF Buffs & deal heavy Special Attack [Enemies with Earth Attribute] damage  & decrease Critical Rate (3 turns) for all enemies

profile:
It is summer. And summer means swimsuit Spirit Origins. After experiencing summer in the Caribbean and realizing how nice it is, Ibuki-Douji thought it was time for her to change into a swimsuit Spirit Origin of her own. And that's exactly what she did! She took one look at her own Spirit Origin and changed it herself.
 
After deciding that her new swimsuit Spirit Origin qualifies her as a goddess of summer, Ibuki-Douji has been delighting in the various forms summer has taken around her. Whatever else happens, she won't be giving up her summer vacation without a fight!

name: Utsumi Erice (Avenger)

personalSkills.name: Boundary on the Underworld Path C

noblePhantasm.name: Ame-no-Kagami-no-Fune
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase Arts Card effectiveness (1 turn)  for yourself + Deal significant Special Attack [Curse] damage & high chance to inflict Death to a single enemy

profile: Japan, in the near future following the end of a Holy Grail War. A young girl who works as a Nightwatch in Mosaic City (Akihabara). The savagery of her methods of hunting down Servants has earned her the nickname Grim Reaper. With Akihabara transformed into a coastal resort city, swimsuits were considered typical casual wear.

name: Scáthach-Skadi (Ruler)

noblePhantasm.name: Gate of Ægir
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase NP Strength (1 turn)  only when on a [Near Water] field for yourself + Deal heavy Special Attack [Lawful] damage  & decrease Charge for all enemies

profile:
Summer is here. And this year's summer minute Singularity is taking place somewhere no one would ever expect: the Arctic Circle!
 
"Enjoy the summer. Know that it has descended upon this land for all eternity."
 
So spoke the Divine Spirit Scáthach-Skadi—who apparently acquired the Holy Grail that appeared in the Arctic Circle—to Master and the other Chaldea staff and Servants.

Now come on in! Arctic Summer World is open for business!

name: Wu Zetian (Caster)

noblePhantasm.name: Lái Lái, My Jiāngshī Torturers
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase NP Strength (1 turn)  for yourself + Apply [Undead] trait (3 turns) & deal heavy Special Attack [Enemies with Human Attribute] damage & decrease DEF (3 turns) for all enemies

profile:
China's one and only empress, now clad in a swimsuit. It's not clear why she has aged somewhat in this form, nor why she is now able to use such mysterious Taoist arts. It seems she saw them in a movie once, and they've been optimized for handling jiāngshī and jiāngshī-adjacent beings. They are also responsible for transforming her Torturers into jiāngshī (details remain unclear) and are what enable her to control them however she likes.
 
Of course, having (now literally) undyingly loyal subordinates is nothing new for the empress. The only difference is that when she commands them to jump, they need not ask how high; jiāngshī hop all the time anyway.
 
Still, it's strange. Wasn't Her Imperial Highness deathly afraid of ghosts and spirits? The answer to that riddle lies deep in the ice of the North Pole.

name: Thrúd

noblePhantasm.name: Fylgja Valkyrie
noblePhantasm.detail: Deal heavy Special Attack [Enemies with Earth Attribute] damage  to all enemies & low chance to inflict Death to all [Demonic] enemies

profile:
The Valkyries, daughters of the Allfather, have transformed into new stealth-optimized Spirit Origins, albeit ones that seem like they should be called "summer Spirit Origins" rather than "swimsuit Spirit Origins." Furthermore, after a series of complicated events, Thrúd, Hildr, and Ortlinde have been joined by three new sisters: Rindr, Rún, and Irs.

And that means...there are six Valkyries now!
 
That being said, only one of them can form a proper contract with Master and be registered as a single combat-ready Spirit Origin (two if you count switching to a Spiritron Dress).

name: Sen-no-Rikyu

noblePhantasm.name: One Moment, Unrepeated
noblePhantasm.detail: Deal heavy Special Attack [Human Attribute] damage  & inflict NP Seal (1 turn) & inflict Curse (5 turns) to all enemies

profile:
A member of the merchant class and tea master who was widely known from the Warring States period to the Azuchi-Momoyama period.

Tanaka Yoshirou was his childhood name. Later, he took the Buddhist name "Sen-no-Soueki." His professional name was Housensai. The well-known "Rikyu" was his Buddhist lay name in later life.

Known as the one who perfected the wabi-cha aesthetic of the Japanese tea ceremony, he rejected the established notion of valuing prestige for its own sake. His tea ceremony was a groundbreaking change, bringing a new set of values. As a retainer to Toyotomi Hideyoshi, the ruler at the time, he also wielded influence over the feudal lords from the shadows.

name: Yamanami Keisuke

noblePhantasm.name: Yamazakura
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase ATK (3 turns) & slightly increase NP Gauge  for all allies + Gain C. Stars each turn (3 turns) for yourself + Increase Critical Strength (3 turns) for all [Shinsengumi Servant] allies

profile: Yamanami Keisuke, the Vice Commander-turned-secretary-general of the Shinsengumi police force of Bakumatsu-period Kyoto. He was said to have been born in Sendai of Mutsu-no-kuni, but details of his background and origins are unknown. He once challenged Kondo Isami's dojo Shieikan, the Tennen Rishinryu school, but was defeated. At the time, he was impressed by Kondo's character, and remained with him as a student of the Shieikan. He also joined the Roushigumi, and after the Mibu-Roushigumi was formed in Kyoto, he eventually became a core member of the Shinsengumi.

name: Iyo

personalSkills.name: Shrine Maiden of the End C

noblePhantasm.name: Twilit Jewel of the Moon
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase NP Strength (3 turns) for yourself + Deal heavy damage & inflict Curse (3 turns)  & inflict Disastrous Curse (increase Curse damage) (3 turns) to all enemies

profile:
The second queen of the legendary Yamataikoku. According to the "Gishiwajinden," Iyo succeeded the first queen, Himiko, and unified a country in turmoil.
However, Yamataikoku disappeared without a trace from subsequent records and faded into the shadows of history. As with Himiko, many mysteries revolve around Iyo, and nothing concrete is known about her to this day.

name: Huyan Zhuo

noblePhantasm.name: Empusa Chain Tempest
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase Quick Card effectiveness (1 turn)  + Deal heavy Special Attack damage to all [Evil] enemies & low chance to inflict Stun (1 turn) to all enemies

profile:
Stars in the sky, and scoundrels upon the earth.

Known as Tianwei, or the Prestige Star of Heaven, and one of the strongest heroes of the "Water Margin." The imperial general who famously employed a tactic called the chain-linked cavalry, which linked a group of armor-clad horses with iron chains. Huyan Zhuo wielded a pair of iron crops called bian, and earned the nickname "Double Bian" Huyan Zhuo.

"This entry makes it sound like the only thing I am is strong! That's all it says!"

name: Huang Feihu

profile:
Huang Feihu is a character from the "Investiture of the Gods." He is said to be a martial arts expert who rode a special bull named Wǔsè Shén Niú, the Five-Colored Divine Ox.

He was originally known as Governing Prince Wucheng and served King Zhou of the Yin dynasty, but when his wife and younger sister were killed in consequence of Daji's machinations, he chose to join King Wu of Xiqi, taking his entire family with him. On his journey to do so, he broke through five checkpoints while fighting wave after wave of enemies. 

After joining Taigong Wang's Xiqi forces, he was named Founding Prince Wucheng and embarked on several campaigns with the aim of taking down King Zhou, but was killed in action.

He has four sons: Huang Tianhua, Huang Tianlu, Huang Tianjue, and Huang Tianxiang.

Stars in the sky, and scoundrels upon the earth. Who is Elisa the Nine-Tattooed Dragon, you ask!? A Servant born of a devilish idea: a mashup of Shi Jin the Nine-Tattooed Dragon and Elisabeth Báthory!

Class? Pretender!

A knight who appeared in the epic poem "The Faerie Queene." She was a friend of King Arthur while they were still young and in training, and later they were adventuring companions. An expert spearman, she sets out on a journey in search of her destined love. Along the way, her search brought her more than her share of adventure.

...All this is the story of her mother, Britomart the lady knight. This Britomart is a Tam Lin who inherited the name...which makes her the second Britomart!

profile: The Foreign God summoned this Pseudo-Servant using a priest's body as a host. Manifesting as the famous Russian mystic Rasputin, he has crossed swords with Chaldea several times. At some times, he has been an enemy. At others, he has been neutral. Occasionally, he has even been an ally. But what are his true intentions...?

profile:
Judgment incarnate. When manifesting more fully as an agent of divine retribution, she materializes as Nitocris Alter, the night wind of the desert.

She is not the pharaoh who rules the underworld as an avatar of the sky god Horus; she is instead the incarnation of Anubis, the very god of the underworld. Now she is both queen of the world below and pharaoh of the skies above.

She could never be summoned in normal human history.

profile:
The most powerful god upon the surface of the Aztec world. He represents conflict—war and magecraft, beauty and discord, night and dominion, storms and plagues, crime and law, fortune and misfortune, providence and rivals—as well as the dynamism their conflicts create.

O great Moyocoyani. O terrible Ilhuicahua Tlalticpaque! Thy name is Tezcatlipoca, avatar of the black sun, which reflects all creation.

profile: A mysterious Servant who goes by the names Tlāloc and Huītzilōpōchtli. Aztec mythology describes Tlāloc as the god of rain and ruler of the world during its third genesis. It also tells of his destruction by a rain of fire. Huītzilōpōchtli is an Aztec tribal deity, revered as a god of war and avatar of the sun.

personalSkills.name: We Are the Winged Serpent EX

profile:
Mesoamerican myth's demiurge and god of good, Kukulcan is a protector of humanity as well as ruler of the wind and harvest. In the Yucatec Mayan language, "Kukulcan" means "feathered serpent" or "winged serpent." In the K'iche' Mayan language, the same deity is known as "Q'uq'umatz."

"Oh, I get it! I'm a big, important god, right!? Then I'd better act like one!"

...Is something wrong with this Kukulcan?

noblePhantasm.name: Legendum Papa Thronus

profile:
Pope Johanna, while beloved, is considered to be wholly fictional. She is the subject of a number of novels and films, and no small number of people believe in her existence.

Recent research has illuminated even the route by which her folklore was established.

Beyond prayer, prayer, and more prayer...
What has she glimpsed?

profile:
A maverick and member of the Restoration Movement who appeared in the Choushu domain during the Bakumatsu period.

Along with Kusaka Genzui, Yoshida Toshimaro, and Irie Kuichi, he was called one of the Four Heavenly Kings of Shokasonjuku, an academy presided over by Yoshida Shouin. They were said to have a bright future.

He may appear to be a calm, gentle intellectual, but he has the uninhibited personality of a troublemaker willing to do anything so long as it amuses him. A true free spirit, he is a dictatorial CEO who makes decisions on the fly and on his own.

name: Larva/Tiamat

personalSkills.name: Eye of the Blue Star B
Eye of the Red Star B
Sea of the Azure Star A

noblePhantasm.name: Nammu Dur-an-ki
noblePhantasm.detail: Remove Debuffs & increase Buster Card effectiveness (3 turns)  for yourself + Deal heavy damage & inflict Skill Seal (1 turn) to all enemies

profile:
The Beast of Creation, unwilling to accept that the humans who once defeated her in 2018 now face destruction at the hands of a different calamity from the sea, has manifested in her juvenile form.

Tiamat created a clone of herself if she had chosen to reset her own development and sent that clone to Chaldea as a Servant. Consequently, the memory of her defeat at humanity's hands remains intact. Now a Divine Spirit Servant, she is perpetually grumpy because she remembers that pain and humiliation. But her love for humanity, as well as her desire to protect them, eclipses even that.

name: Locusta

noblePhantasm.name: Finis, Fungus
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase Arts Card effectiveness (1 turn)  for yourself + Inflict Poison (5 turns) & deal heavy Special Attack damage to a single [Poison] enemy  & inflict Corroding Poison (increase Poison effectiveness) (5 turns) to a single enemy

profile:
This woman from first-century Rome was a poisoner in service to the Caesars. She was discovered by Nero's mother Agrippina and is said to have supplied the poison used in the murder of Claudius, the fourth emperor of Rome. She then served the newly crowned Emperor Nero and was involved in the assassination of Nero's half-brother, Britannicus. Locusta is further believed to have been involved in several other assassinations of important figures.

She is the archetypal poisoner in Western nations. The nineteenth-century author Alexandre Dumas père, who penned "The Count of Monte Cristo," frequently compared the character of the poisoner in his novel with Locusta.

name: Kashin Koji

noblePhantasm.name: Karakuri Gehou: Frenzied Force

profile:
The legendary practitioner of illusionary techniques (gejutsu and youjutsu). Their skills were so great they were rumored to be able to temporarily revive the dead. They seem to have been quite well-known, especially around the capital in Kyoto. While it is said they were a ninja, who they served and what manner of tasks they undertook in that capacity remain a mystery.

...Their left eye glints crimson, a mark of demonic power.

name: Bhīma

noblePhantasm.name: Maruti, Vāyuputra
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase Critical Strength (3 turns) for yourself + Remove Buffs & deal significant damage & deal additional heavy damage with Overcharge  to a single enemy

profile:
One of the main characters in the Indian epic, the "Mahabharata." He is the second of the five legendary Pandava brothers, making him Arjuna's older brother. Born to the wind god Vāyu, he was the most physically powerful of the Five Princes. There are stories of him destroying a man-eating demon called a rakshasa as well as confronting Hanumān, a fellow child of the wind god. In India, his name is a synonym for unparalleled strength even to this day.

He is as gluttonous as he looks but is also quite a skilled cook. When he needed to conceal his identity for a year, he worked as a royal chef.

name: Duryodhana

noblePhantasm.name: Jai, Kaurava
noblePhantasm.detail: Chance to decrease Quick Card Resistance (3 turns)  & chance to decrease Arts Card Resistance (3 turns)  & chance to decrease Buster Card Resistance (3 turns)  & deal heavy damage to all enemies

profile:
Duryodhana is a prominent figure in the "Mahabharata." He is the eldest of the hundred Kaurava princes that clashed with Arjuna, Bhīma, and the rest of the five Pandava princes. His mother was blessed by a sage, promising she would birth one hundred children. In actuality, though, she gave birth only to a single lump of flesh. The sage then divided the flesh into one hundred pieces and placed them in jars. From these, her one hundred sons were born.

Duryodhana was constantly in conflict with the Pandavas, even conspiring with his uncle to trick the five brothers in the rigged gambling scheme that led to their banishment from their own kingdom. Even after their period of exile ended, Duryodhana did not allow the five brothers to return, ultimately leading to the great Kurukshetra War.

Duryodhana was a great warrior and master of the mace, whose skill was recognized even by Krishna. However, he was finally defeated by Bhīma in a duel. He left everything in Aśvatthāman's hands when he died.

name: Durgā

noblePhantasm.name: Mahiṣāsuramardinī
noblePhantasm.detail: Apply Special Attack [enemies with Heaven attribute] (1 turn) for yourself + Deal heavy Special Attack damage to all [Demonic] enemies  & decrease DEF (3 turns) for all enemies

profile:
Durgā is the goddess of war in Indian mythology. She is Shiva's consort and is believed to be either the same being as or another aspect of Pārvatī, the goddess of grace. In modern times, she is usually depicted as a beautiful woman with three eyes and many arms.

It is said that when the heavenly world was attacked by a powerful demon god, the light of the gods' anger coalesced into a single form, and so Durgā was born. The gods then each bestowed upon her the weapons which were symbolic of each of them, including the trident, the chakram, and the spear. Wielding these heavenly armaments, she defeated the demon god.

name: Medusa

noblePhantasm.name: Chrysaor
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase Quick Card effectiveness (1 turn)  for yourself + Deal significant Special Attack [Human Attribute] damage & low chance to immobilize (1 turn) one enemy + Increase ATK (3 turns) for all allies with [Earth Attribute]

profile: Following Perseus's beheading of the serpent-haired monster whose Mystic Eyes turned people to stone, two beings were born from her blood. One was the winged horse named Pegasus. The other was a monster holding a golden sword.

personalSkills.name: Faerie from the Land of Rain A

profile:
This is a childhood dream.

This is the tale of a witch from the Land of Rain who loved kind, sleepy stories. She was a faerie, but taught herself magecraft and even created her own spells. Despite her royal status, she loved adventuring and running through the open fields.

This is the savior as she began, before experiencing myriad fates, betrayals, and changes.

profile:
A mage from one of the Lostbelts arrives to solve an incident in a tropical Singularity, changing her Spirit Origin to make her summer debut. By changing the magecraft she learned into song and dance, she is now able to handle much more complex magecraft at will (or so she claims.) The guardian of the sacred sword has now become quite the aficionado of all things summer.

"My name may have 'Caster' in it, but I'm a Berserker. I can see why people find me so intriguing!"

As Altria Caster happily babbles away, Fou walks by with an indifferent look. (Special translation: Not really... Same as always.)

name: Suzuka Gozen (Vacay)

noblePhantasm.name: Summer Nirvana, Sunbeam Garden
noblePhantasm.detail: Apply Ignore Invincible (1 turn) & Special Attack [Lawful] (1 turn) for yourself + Deal heavy Special Attack damage to all enemies with [Earth Attribute]

profile:
Suzuka had a problem: to be Santa, or to wear a swimsuit... There are just too many outfits for a high school girl to look good in. Ultimately, she came to the conclusion that she should focus on enjoying summer! You know what that means: Suzuka Gozen Vacay!

She always had the potential to be a Rider, but now she also has the freedom of summer and the vehicles to go with it! The feeling of the wind blowing in your hair!? Nothing beats it!

...Which is how she ended up on a motorcycle. Since the opportunity arose, she also turned into a pit girl. Two birds, one stone. Right?

"Look out, summer, here I come!"

name: Chloe von Einzbern

personalSkills.name: We Can Get It Replaced in Time D++

noblePhantasm.name: Monochrome Impulse
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase Quick Card effectiveness (3 turns)  for yourself + Deal significant damage  & decrease Charge for a single enemy

profile:
ServantFes is back!

The air is thick with feverish excitement and a creative passion to match! What masterpieces will it yield this time? Everyone waits with bated breath for the next brilliant work of art, but for some reason, the creators aren't...well...creating anything!

"It's been a while since I participated in an event like this and I'm worried I don't have the energy. I'll get on it tomorrow."

"You can't rush inspiration. I'll get on it tomorrow."

"I'm tired. I'm going to play games today. I'll get on it tomorrow."

Chloe can't help herself, she's furious. And so she decided to take matters into her own hands by managing the self-centered and unmotivated creators herself. And so Chloe changed her class to Avenger...or rather, Editor.

name: Cnoc na Riabh Yaraändoo

classSkills.name: Star of the Southern Sky EX

profile:
The young queen who was to be next in line after defeating Morgan, who ruled Faerie Britain for an age. Her long-held promise was finally fulfilled. She was looking forward to beginning her life on her own terms rather than simply being her predecessor's successor. And so, she traveled to the coronation ceremony with the blessing of her rival, Altria Caster.

...Well, let's leave the story of her time in Faerie Britain there. Anyway, she's arrived as a Servant! Master was bewildered. Altria Caster froze, eyes wide in shock. 

This girl looks the same, speaks and acts (pretty much) the same...but can it REALLY be her?

With many mysteries unsolved, the second Servant Summer Festival is set to begin in a tropical paradise.

name: Mélusine

noblePhantasm.name: Sprite Albion

profile:
Mélusine arrived at the tropical paradise as one of Queen Morgan's attendants. While she was initially against going, the moment she set foot on the island, the liberating feeling awakened her feral instincts (life is fun! I need to play!) as well as her fate as a dragon (I need to make the best memories with my love). With that decided, her usual Lancer class seemed not to be a particularly good fit, so she changed into a class better suited for vacation.

With her preparations complete, she lies in wait for Master.

profile: No matter the place or circumstance, the duty of the strong remains the same. Seeing a forest constantly plagued with fires, this knight created a new organization. Its name: Union Defence Knights of the Forest, or UDK. A Super Ranger tasked with the protection of the forest is born.

Any rebellious peasants will be turned into stickers. But she also turns obedient peasants into stickers just for fun. Now, this overwhelming mass of fluff shakes up the tropics. Who could the mysterious Miko, shrine maiden in service to the enshrined deity, possibly be?

profile:
Wandjina exists high above the world, observing its surface from its skies. At times, Wandjina becomes the blessed water that falls from the skies to soak the earth, enriching all life below.

This ancient spirit is believed to have existed since the Mesozoic era, when dinosaurs still roamed the world. The rainy season and rain...the source of life.

A great spirit to surpass all others...that is Wandjina. Artwork depicting this great spirit can be found in the Kimberley region of northwestern Australia.

While Wandjina already existed on a truly grand scale, an encounter with the Servant Universe granted Wandjina the aspect of a guardian protecting the seven water stars. And so was born Wandjina the Space Spirit.

profile:
Sugitani Zenjubou was a talented sniper of the Sengoku period. In 1570, at the Rokkaku clan's request, he attempted to assassinate Oda Nobunaga, but was unsuccessful.

History records that after three years on the run, Sugitani was finally caught by Isono Kazumasa and executed by gradual beheading.

Aside from the attempted shooting, the only known records of him are as a famous marksman born in the Sugitani region.

name: Thēseus

noblePhantasm.name: Ariadne Apolyto Hades
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase Critical Strength (3 turns)  & apply Special Attack [Demonic Beast type Servant] status (1 turn) to yourself + Deal significant Special Attack damage to a single [Giant] enemy + Gain C. Stars

profile:
An ancient Greek hero, said to be related to Heracles.

Thēseus was a seasoned adventurer who even spent time aboard the Argo.

In one of his most famous exploits, he ventured into the great labyrinth of Crete to slay the Minotaur. After defeating the man-eating monster, he went on to perform many more heroic feats which would in turn be recorded in legend!

That's where it all began.

...But all I sought was justice.

name: Takeda Harunobu

profile:
Takeda Shingen, Kai's daimyo during the Warring States period, was widely renowned for commanding the strongest cavalry force during those turbulent times. His tactical acumen and diplomatic finesse led to many victories, making him a tremendous threat to the other daimyo.

"The people will be your castles, your walls, and your moats. Mercy is your ally. Cruelty is your enemy."

name: Nagakura Shinpachi

noblePhantasm.name: Ryuhiken
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase Buster Card effectiveness (1 turn)  & greatly increase Critical Strength (1 turn) for yourself + Remove Evade & deal significant damage to a single enemy

profile:
Nagakura Shinpachi was the captain of the second unit of the Shinsengumi, the militia group that operated in Kyoto during the Bakumatsu period.

Nagakura was considered to be one of the greatest swordsmen even in the ranks of the Shinsengumi, which was comprised of masters of the sword. As the saying went: "First is Nagakura, second is Okita, and third is Saito."

Nagakura managed to survive the end of the shogunate upheaval and lived to see the Meiji era. He also recorded accounts of the Shinsengumi to pass down to future generations in his memoir, "Shinsengumi Tenmatsuki."

name: Saika Magoichi

noblePhantasm.name: God of Firearms, Yatagarasu
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase Quick Card effectiveness (1 turn)  & Buster Card effectiveness (1 turn)  for yourself + Deal significant damage & decrease Critical Rate (3 turns) for a single enemy

profile: The Saika clan was a group of mercenary riflemen from Japan's Warring States period. Their leader is said to have been named Saika Magoichi. Magoichi found fame on the field of battle by fighting against Oda Nobunaga on behalf of Honganji, but much remains a mystery about them. One proposed explanation is that the given name "Magoichi" was in fact a title passed down through many generations. However, it may have been that several people's deeds were attributed to the same individual.

name: Uesugi Kenshin

noblePhantasm.name: Biten's Eight Aspects, Shiranui
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase Arts Card effectiveness (1 turn)  for yourself + Remove Buffs & deal significant Special Attack [Human Attribute] damage to a single enemy

profile:
Uesugi Kenshin, Echigo's god of war, who was hailed as a righteous general of Japan's war-torn age.

As the arbiter of the battlefield, she wielded power on par with Bishamonten. Her existence was so utterly foreign and extraordinary that one couldn't help but wonder if she really was the incarnation of a deity. 

It's well-known that Kenshin sent salt to her mortal enemy, Takeda Shingen of Kai. The battle of Kawanakajima, where she faced off against Shingen, has become the stuff of legend.

"Can I really go all out? I am Bishamonten, you know!"

name: Nemo (Santa)

classSkills.name: Protection of the Sea God D

profile:
The boy's mission, which he has chosen to accept: to deliver a cargo of hope for the future.

"The landing craft Carolinus will immediately be redesignated 'armored land transport PP' and deployed. Let's clear every delivery slip before Christmas is over!"

His outfit has changed from a crisp uniform to work clothes, his field has changed from the sea to land, and he now mans the wheel of a land transport rather than a ship. But his calm, composed smile remains the same.

Captain Nemo makes his Santa Claus debut!

profile:
A hero and tragic prince. In ancient Japan, they were a great conqueror who wielded a divine sword at the command of their father the king. They slew the rulers of foreign lands and even deities, pressing ever onward. In the end, it was the power of the god of Mt. Ibuki that became their end.

It is also said that after dying they transformed into a swan and flew away.

name: Minamoto-no-Raikou/Ushi Gozen

A sharp but fleeting black blade. A wild oni child who freely dons her pitch-black armor.

This Servant calls herself "Minamoto-no-Raikou," the most powerful Mystic Slayer and the epitome of the Heian warrior ideal. However, her True Name is Ushi Gozen...a being who controls lightning itself and can only be called an unholy transgressor.

name: Yui Shousetsu

profile:
A young warrior who wears her hair tied up. She disguises herself as a man so that she may be a samurai, but her body and mind are female. In truth, she is an artificial person created through alchemy by Mori Soiken, the confidant of the Shimabara Rebellion's Amakusa Shirou, making her a kind of homunculus. However, as her creation required a human female as an incubator, she is technically not a true homunculus.

Though she is over thirty years old, she appears to be in her late teens. She possesses an artificial magical circuit, and was taught Western magecraft by Mori Soiken. After Mori Soiken's death in the Shimabara Rebellion, she was raised in a samurai household and made a name for herself as a military scholar in Edo, eventually landing a government job with the shogunate...where she learned of the existence of the "Waxing Moon Ritual."

She is one of the Masters who fought in a pseudo-Holy Grail War of a parallel world, separate from Proper Human History.

name: Miyamoto Iori

noblePhantasm.detail: Unknown

profile:
The disciple and adopted son of the swordsman Miyamoto Musashi, and practitioner of Niten Ichiryu.

While he has manifested as a Heroic Spirit, Iori possesses little knowledge and even less awareness of his state. It is said that heroes and great warriors who were inscribed upon human history become Heroic Spirits after their death. If that's true, why would someone who quietly lived in peacetime Edo—an era when major conflict was over and military exploits were no longer possible—be summoned as a Heroic Spirit? He doesn't even remember dying.

name: Andromeda

noblePhantasm.name: Aethiopia Cetus
noblePhantasm.detail: Decrease DEF (3 turns)  & deal heavy damage & inflict Skill Seal (1 turn) to all enemies + Greatly increase DEF (1 turn) for yourself

profile:
A sacrificial maiden described in Greek mythology. She was offered to a leviathan to quell the gods' anger, only for the great hero Perseus to save her when he happened across the scene. She is frequently depicted in chains, shackled to a boulder by the sea.

It is said that after Perseus saved her, Andromeda wed him and bore him many children. Among their descendants was the famed hero Heracles, her great-grandson.

name: Marie Antoinette (Alter)

noblePhantasm.name: Vae Victis
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase NP Strength (1 turn)  for yourself + Inflict Curse (5 turns) & Disastrous Curse (increase Curse damage) (5 turns) & deal heavy damage & decrease Charge & medium chance to inflict Death to all enemies

profile:
A dark flower born from the death of royal authority and the queen's despair. This queen has cast aside the version of herself idolized by so many to instead embrace vengeance at the expense of all else. Now, she is the embodiment of the despair, rage, and sorrow the Heroic Spirit Marie Antoinette—who loves her people and country unreservedly and speaks happily of ideals—consciously discarded.

Since she is another aspect of the Heroic Spirit Marie Antoinette, her life as a human was entirely the same as the French queen's. As she is now, however, she is keenly aware of her role as a tragic queen, and as a mother who lost her children.

name: Hassan of the Shining Star

noblePhantasm.name: Zabaniya
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase Quick Card effectiveness (1 turn)  & Arts Card effectiveness (1 turn)  & NP Strength (3 turns) for yourself + Deal heavy Special Attack [Human Attribute] damage to all enemies + Decrease 1000 HP for yourself [Demerit]

profile:
An assassin clad in a black robe and skull mask, wielding a black blade. He is known as "Hassan of the Shining Star," and was one of those who served as the "Old Man of the Mountain," the leader of the Hassan-i Sabbah.

Owing to his mastery of abilities so extraordinary they bordered on the supernatural, he rose to the position of leader at a very young age. He did not actually make decisions for the entire Order (as was also true for Hassan of the Serenity), but rather continued to fulfill his duties as ordered by the sect's elders.

name: Richard I

noblePhantasm.name: Utopie Purgatoire
noblePhantasm.detail: Increase Critical Strength (3 turns) for yourself + Deal heavy damage & decrease Quick Card resistance (3 turns)  & Arts Card resistance (3 turns)  & Buster Card resistance (3 turns)  & inflict Burn (5 turns) to all enemies

profile: Is he a valiant king, or a bloodthirsty conqueror? Richard I moved freely between legend and reality, myth and history. Will a new tale of the fierce king who leaped into the front lines of battle after formulating a whole array of plans blossom in Chaldea? Stay tuned!
